allow: Bash(ssh root@172.233.163.131 "ls /root/ && which node && which pnpm")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@172.233.163.131 "find / -maxdepth 4 -name ''package.json'' -path ''*/GroundWork/*'' -o -name ''groundwork'' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -10; ls /root/ 2>/dev/null; ls /var/www/ 2>/dev/null; ls /opt/ 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@172.233.163.131 "cd /opt/groundwork && git remote -v && git log --oneline -3 && git status -s")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@172.233.163.131 "ls -la /opt/groundwork/dist/ && systemctl restart nginx 2>/dev/null || service nginx restart 2>/dev/null || echo ''No nginx restart needed''")
